---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for image-combiner
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem. (e.g. "I always have to manually resize images before combining them because...")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Any other context, mockups, or examples that illustrate the feature.
